The '''C-136''' was a land-based [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] produced by [[Speizoc Arms]]. Intended for use against targets such as [[City/Legends|cities]] and other infrastructure, the C-136 was also capable of striking targets in low-[[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. The C-136 was effective against the less refined [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] designs of the time it was designed in, but the weapon became obsolete as the effectiveness of shield technology increased.

==Description==
The C-136 was designed for line-of-sight attacks, and was employed against large targets such as [[City/Legends|cities]], although it was also deployed against other created structures such as bridges and dams, and even low-[[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] stationary targets. The C-136 had a maximum range of twenty-five thousand [[Meter/Legends|meters]] with a one hundred meter blast radius. The extreme long-range of the weapon allowed it to be deployed and fired from behind friendly lines.<ref name="ISB" />

The weapon took between six and twelve [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to assemble and set-up. A crew of seven operated the weapon, including a forward observer for accurate long range fire. Connected to a [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]], the C-136 had enough ammunition for forty shots but the power drain was enormous. The magnitude of the energy blast from the cannon produced [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] effects along the path of the weapon discharge which caused ionization hazards.<ref name="ISB" />

==History==
When the C-136 was designed, [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] technology was less refined than during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], meaning that siege warfare and bombardment strategies were effective against shielded ground targets such as cities. To facilitate these strategies, Speizoc Arms produced the C-136, commonly referred to as the "Grandfather Gun." Possibly the largest land-based [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] ever built, a refinement of the ion cannon technology built to penetrate the primitive urban shields in use at the time of its design.<ref name="ISB" />

As shield technology improved, the C-136 was obsoleted as its effectiveness was reduced. However, the weapon was still employed on frontier [[Planet/Legends|planets]] which employed less advanced technology and where ground-based artillery options were still a practical and valid form of warfare. Its effectiveness also had a psychological impact on the target, as the weapon offered the threat of pin-point long-range destruction. It was also effective on planets where atmospheric or gravitic conditions prevented the use of airborne or [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] weapons.<ref name="ISB" />

By the time of the Galactic Civil War, the C-136 was no longer in production and could only be bought used for around 100,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] a piece. As a result, replacement parts were hard to find.<ref name="ISB" /> [[Trioculus]] once fired a C-136 at a dam in the [[Grand Kessel River Valley]], flooding a rebellious settlement below.<ref name="QotE">''[[Queen of the Empire]]''</ref>
